title: ApprovedPlanPacket
description: Shared approval / delegation packet consumed by $run --execute-approved, /handoff --target=codex, and /delegate. Stored at .agents/approved-plan.json (gitignored, developer-local).

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp, must end in Z.

git_head.description: Full 40-char SHA of HEAD at approval time.

todo_hash.description: sha256 of tasks/todo.md after BOM strip + CRLF->LF normalization.

allowed_dirty_paths.description: Globs of paths allowed to be dirty without invalidating freshness. JSON-only (path layout not safe to mirror).

blocking_manual_tasks.description: Snapshot (content, not file refs) of _(blocks: Step N.X)_ lines from tasks/manual-todo.md at approval time.
